title: More Nonsense Limerick 17
content:
There was an old person of China,
    Whose daughters were Jiska and Dinah,
    Amelia and Fluffy, 
    Olivia and Chuffy,
    And all of them settled in China.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 17"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
